category_sources: source_facts.description says displays differences between SQLite databases; official SQLite sqldiff page describes sqldiff.exe as a command-line utility that displays content differences between SQLite databases.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is sqldiff; official SQLite documentation page title is sqldiff.exe: Database Difference Utility.
docs_sources: Official SQLite sqldiff documentation page is the best documentation surface and includes usage, how it works, and limitations.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is official SQLite sqldiff documentation; source_facts.source-archive is from sqlite.org source distribution, whose official source-control browser is https://www.sqlite.org/src.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies SQLite database diffing; official SQLite sqldiff page documents the command-line utility and SQL output behavior; source_facts.executables lists sqldiff.
